CustomField.description: This field displays the total approved payable amount, which is automatically calculated by summing all the payables for the Security Deposit that have been created and approved but not yet paid out. The value updates automatically as approved payables remain unpaid. [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: No needs to do load, because this field automatically populates after Payable approval.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total approved payable amount that has not been paid out. System calculated.
CustomField.label: Refund Committed
